title: Unity Software (U) Earnings Date & Report
text: Upcoming Earnings Schedule: Next Q2 2026 earnings report expected May 28, 2026. Previous Q1 2026 earnings reported on May 7, 2026. Quarterly Earnings Calendar: The company has shifted to quarterly guidance in 2025-2026, providing more regular updates to the market. Recent Earnings Pattern: Unity has demonstrated consistent ability to beat analyst estimates across Q2, Q3, Q4 2024 and Q1 2026. Earnings Quality: Adjusted EBITDA and free cash flow metrics show improving operational performance, though GAAP net income remains negative pending Q4 2026 profitability milestone. Analyst Expectations for Q2 2026: Strategic revenue expected $455-465M (29-32% YoY growth). Adjusted EBITDA expected $130-135M (44-49% margin expansion). Profitability Path: Management has guided to GAAP profitability in Q4 2026, with declining amortization charges ($117M in Q1 to $55M by Q4) supporting margin expansion. Key Drivers: Vector platform momentum, Create Solutions subscription growth, and cost structure improvements expected to drive Q2 results.
